Presidency University Bachelor Degree En.official_note: Official Presidency University notices page; verified it hosts PUBDET/PUMDET subject-wise provisional merit lists and rank lists (as received from WBJEEB). PUBDET is conducted by WBJEEB; merit list PDFs (e.g. PUBDET2024_meritlist.pdf) are published here. The admission.php page only has application links, no results.

Punjab Para Medical Entrance Test Baba F.official_note: BFUHS (Faridkot) is the official PPMET conducting body; result/merit list 2026 published as PDF at bfuhs.ac.in (declared 12 Jun 2026). The configured AllNotifications.aspx now returns HTTP 404; homepage verified and links the entrance-test portals (e.g. nursing26online) and notifications where PPMET merit list/counselling notices appear.

Rajasthan Pre Bachelor of Education and.official_note: Official VMOU Kota PTET 2025 counselling/allotment portal; search-confirmed that college allotment lists and letters (1st on 25 Jul 2025, 2nd on 18 Aug 2025) are released here. This is the year-specific official portal for Rajasthan PTET.

Rajasthan Pre Veterinary Test.official_note: Official RAJUVAS (Bikaner) admission portal. The configured rajuvas.org/admission.php is dead (rajuvas.org 301-redirects to rajuvas.ac.in and .../admission.php 404s). RAJUVAS conducts RPVT and runs BVSc & AH counselling here; admission page verified and references the Pre PG/RPVT information bulletin and counselling.

Rajasthan University Law Entrance Test.official_note: Dedicated RULET page on the official University of Rajasthan (UNIRAJ) site; verified it carries RULET admission/merit-list schedules, results and counselling/personal-interview notices (content currently archival RULET-2019 but it is the canonical RULET notice page). admissions.univraj.org/rul/ is the linked online application portal.

Rajasthan University of Health Sciences.official_note: RUHS Jaipur (ruhsraj.org) is the official body conducting the RUHS CUET for BSc Nursing; merit list/result published at ruhsraj.org (declared 2 Jun 2026) and counselling run via the CUET portal. Correct official domain but the fetcher hit a TLS certificate name-mismatch (ERR_TLS_CERT_ALTNAME_INVALID), so could not fully fetch the page.

RUHS Jaipur (ruhsraj.org) conducts the RUHS CUET covering paramedical courses (B.Sc MLT, Oph.Tech, BRT); merit list/result and counselling published at ruhsraj.org. Correct official domain but the fetcher hit a TLS certificate name-mismatch (ERR_TLS_CERT_ALTNAME_INVALID), so could not fully fetch the page.
